text.title: User Interviews Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

list.pattern: lint_status == 'fail' AND artefact submitted as final.
version not in semver MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH form.
required field missing or set to a placeholder string (e.g. 'tbd', '...', 'fill in').

example.code: { "artefact_id": "user-interviews-example", "method": "Method used for the report (e.g. interview / heuristic / test).", "sample_size": 6, "findings": [ "item-1", "item-2", "item-3" ], "severity_breakdown": { "high": 1, "medium": 2, "low": 0 }, "recommendations": [ "item-1", "item-2" ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "lint_status": "pass", "owner": "@solo-founder" }
example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
Invalid — required fields missing or forbidden patterns matched (e.g. semver violation).
